headline: UNH's $1.5B AI Push: Can It Deliver More Than Cost Savings?
summary: UnitedHealth plans to invest nearly $1.5B in AI for 2026, expanding automation, digital tools and software platforms to drive growth beyond traditional cost savings.

raw.headline: UNH's $1.5B AI Push: Can It Deliver More Than Cost Savings?
raw.summary: UnitedHealth plans to invest nearly $1.5B in AI for 2026, expanding automation, digital tools and software platforms to drive growth beyond traditional cost savings.

headline: Centene exits Arkansas Medicaid expansion program, citing funding challenges
summary: ARHOME represents a small portion of Centene’s overall membership and premiums. But the exit represents how insurers are rejigging their businesses in advance of Medicaid work requirements, one analyst said.

raw.headline: Centene exits Arkansas Medicaid expansion program, citing funding challenges
